name: flipper-claude-buddy
description: Flipper Zero as a physical remote control and feedback device for Claude Code. Provides sound, vibration, and display feedback on a Flipper Zero connected via USB or BLE.

serial_port.description: Serial port for Flipper Zero USB (leave empty for auto-detect, e.g. /dev/cu.usbmodemXXXX)

transport.description: Transport to use: 'auto' (default, tries USB then BLE), 'usb', or 'ble'

bluetoothName.description: Flipper Zero BLE device name prefix (required for BLE — shown in Flipper mobile app, e.g. 'Flip')
